subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested Himself and sent down whatsoever He willeth. He is the Speaker on the Day of Return Who calleth all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اظهر نفسه و انزل ما اراد و هو الناطق فی یوم المعاد و دعا الکل
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
